home-loads.name: Home page loads
home-loads.description: Home page renders with main heading visible

navigation-between-pages.name: Navigate between main sections
navigation-between-pages.description: User navigates across home, about, services and contact pages

navigation-header.name: Working header navigation
navigation-header.description: Header/nav element exists and contains navigation links

navigation-footer.name: Working footer
navigation-footer.description: Footer element is visible on the home page

services-overview.name: Services Overview
services-overview.description: Guest visits /services and sees the three engagement options

services-language-assurance.name: Language Assurance
services-language-assurance.description: Guest visits /services/language-assurance and sees the Language Assurance service detail

services-localization-adaptation.name: Localization & Adaptation
services-localization-adaptation.description: Guest visits /services/localization-adaptation and sees the Localization & Adaptation service detail

services-applied-cultural-intelligence.name: Applied Cultural Intelligence
services-applied-cultural-intelligence.description: Guest visits /services/applied-cultural-intelligence and sees the Applied Cultural Intelligence service detail

contact-page.name: Contact
contact-page.description: Guest visits /contact and sees the contact page

about-page.name: About
about-page.description: Guest visits /about and sees the about page content

contact-form-submit.name: Contact form submit
contact-form-submit.description: Guest fills out the contact qualifier form and submits — success banner appears

cta-home-to-contact.name: CTA: Home → Contact
cta-home-to-contact.description: Guest clicks 'Book a diagnostic call' CTA on home page and lands on /contact

contact-book-call-cal-popup.name: Contact: Book a call opens Cal.com scheduler
contact-book-call-cal-popup.description: Guest clicks 'Book a diagnostic call' or 'Book an ACI Talk' in the QUICK START aside on /contact and the Cal.com scheduling popup opens

contact-cta-scroll-to-form-hint.name: Contact: form CTA scrolls to form and shows hint
contact-cta-scroll-to-form-hint.description: Guest clicks a form-directed CTA (e.g. 'Request an audit', 'Talk to an Expert') on /contact — the page scrolls to the qualifier form and a highlight hint banner appears

cta-service-detail-to-contact.name: CTA: Service detail → Contact
cta-service-detail-to-contact.description: Guest clicks the primary CTA on a service detail page and lands on /contact

cta-services-core-solution-to-contact.name: CTA: Core solution card → Contact
cta-services-core-solution-to-contact.description: Guest clicks a core-solution card text-link CTA (e.g. 'Request an AI QA Sprint →') on /services and lands on /contact

services-card-to-detail.name: Services card → Detail page
services-card-to-detail.description: Guest clicks a service card on /services and navigates to the service detail page

breadcrumb-back-to-services.name: Breadcrumb: Detail → Services
breadcrumb-back-to-services.description: Guest clicks '← ALL SERVICES' breadcrumb on a service detail page and returns to /services

mobile-navigation-drawer.name: Mobile navigation drawer
mobile-navigation-drawer.description: Guest on mobile opens the hamburger drawer and navigates to a page

header-services-dropdown.name: Header services dropdown
header-services-dropdown.description: Guest hovers the Services nav item on desktop, dropdown appears, and clicking navigates correctly

fab-contact-button.name: FAB contact button
fab-contact-button.description: Guest clicks the floating action button and lands on /contact

language-toggle-preference.name: Language toggle preference
language-toggle-preference.description: Guest clicks the ES language toggle and the preference is stored in localStorage

mobile-language-toggle.name: Mobile language toggle in main bar
mobile-language-toggle.description: Guest on a mobile viewport switches locale from the EN|ES toggle in the main header bar without opening the drawer

i18n-locale-switch.name: Locale switch (EN ⇄ ES)
i18n-locale-switch.description: Guest toggles the header EN|ES switcher; URL gains/loses the /es prefix, content language changes, <html lang> updates

i18n-locale-persistence-nav.name: Locale persists across nav links
i18n-locale-persistence-nav.description: After switching to ES, guest navigates via header/footer/FAB links and every destination keeps the /es prefix and Spanish content

footer-links-navigation.name: Footer links navigation
footer-links-navigation.description: Guest clicks a footer link and navigates to the correct page

blog-list.name: Blog list view
blog-list.description: Guest visits /blog and sees a grid of published posts

blog-detail.name: Blog detail view
blog-detail.description: Guest opens a blog post detail and sees title and back link

blog-pagination.name: Blog pagination
blog-pagination.description: Guest navigates from page 1 to page 2 of /blog

blog-language-switch.name: Blog language switch
blog-language-switch.description: Guest switches blog list to Spanish via the EN/ES toggle

contact-form-error-state.name: Contact form server error
contact-form-error-state.description: When POST /api/contact/ returns 5xx, the UI shows a red error banner instead of the success state

contact-form-request-type.name: Contact form request type
contact-form-request-type.description: Guest picks a QUICK START request type, submits, and the selected intent is included in the POST /api/contact/ payload

blog-card-to-detail.name: Blog card click navigates to detail
blog-card-to-detail.description: Guest clicks a BlogCard link on /blog and lands on /blog/<slug> with the lang query param preserved

blog-back-from-detail-to-list.name: Back link from blog detail to list
blog-back-from-detail-to-list.description: Guest clicks '← BACK TO BLOG' on /blog/<slug> and returns to /blog with the same lang query param

header-blog-link.name: Header Blog nav link
header-blog-link.description: Guest clicks 'Blog' in the desktop header nav and navigates to /blog from any page

header-contact-link.name: Header Contact nav link
header-contact-link.description: Guest clicks the 'Contact / Contacto' tab in the desktop header nav and navigates to /contact
